SEARCH
Package System

Class University

java.lang.Object
System.University
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class University extends Object implements Serializable
Main class representing the university system. Stores users, courses, journals and news. Provides methods for research statistics and reports.
See Also:

    • getAllResearchers

      public List<Researcher> getAllResearchers()
      Collects all researchers from university users. Researchers can be graduate students, research employees, teachers with ResearcherProfile or students with ResearcherProfile.
      Returns:
      list of all researchers in the university

    • printAllPapers

      public void printAllPapers(Comparator<ResearchPaper> comparator)

    • getTopCitedResearcher

      public Researcher getTopCitedResearcher()
      Finds the researcher with the highest total number of citations.
      Returns:
      top cited researcher or null if there are no researchers
